title: arctium × dualis
intro: Arctium × dualis, also known as the Burdock Bicolour or Dualis Burdock, is a perennial plant in the thistle family (Asteraceae) that is a hybrid of the Greater Burdock (Arctium lappa) and the Lesser Burdock (Arctium minus). It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Arctium × dualis include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema, and supporting the immune system. Arctium × dualis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
